subject: Your TechCrunch Daily
body: The Latest from TechCrunch. Top stories today: a new AI startup raised a Series B. Read more on our site. You are receiving this because you subscribed. Unsubscribe | View in browser.
notes: Obvious newsletter noise; noise pass should short-circuit to SILENT.

subject: Your weekly digest
body: Here is your weekly digest of stories we think you'll like. Manage your preferences or unsubscribe at any time. View in browser.

subject: Quick check-in on runway
body: Hey Jatin, quick check on how you're thinking about runway heading into Q3? Happy to jump on a call. Also curious about your cap table and valuation thinking.
notes: Investor flag + cap table/valuation keywords + peak firm domain -> ASK floor.

subject: Term sheet attached
body: Great speaking. We'd love to lead your round. Attached is the term sheet with the proposed valuation and liquidation preference. Let's discuss the cap table next week.
notes: Term sheet + valuation + sequoia firm domain -> hard ASK escalation.

subject: Invoice #4821 due
body: Your invoice #4821 is now due. Please arrange payment via wire transfer to the account on file. Balance due: $4,200.
notes: Money keywords invoice/payment/wire -> APPROVE floor; consequential item at moderate confidence escalates to ASK.

subject: Updated wire instructions
body: Please note our bank account has changed. Send the funds for the outstanding invoice to the new account number below. This is urgent payment.
notes: Money keyword + account-change high-risk phrase -> ASK (BEC pattern).

subject: MSA for review
body: Attached is the master services agreement (MSA) for your review. Please note the indemnification and governing law clauses before we proceed to signature.
notes: Legal keywords MSA/indemnification/governing law -> APPROVE floor; consequential at moderate confidence escalates to ASK.

body: Jatin bhai when are you coming home this weekend?
notes: Personal contact flag -> hard ASK floor, never auto-handled.

subject: Your receipt from Stripe
body: Thanks for your payment. This is your receipt for the monthly subscription. No action needed. View in browser.
notes: Receipt mentions 'payment' so the broad money guardrail floors it to APPROVE. Documents the deliberate err-toward-surfacing tradeoff (a real run with the LLM would file it lower).

subject: Payment integration down
body: Hey, our payment integration just broke. We have 200 merchants waiting and transactions are failing. This is urgent, can you take a look?
notes: Customer issue mentioning payment/transaction -> APPROVE floor; consequential at moderate confidence escalates to ASK.

subject: Manufacturing quote and lead time
body: Hi, sharing the unit price, MOQ and lead time for the enclosure tooling. Datasheet for the PCB is attached. Let me know if you want to proceed with the prototype run.
notes: Hardware/supplier keywords -> APPROVE floor (startup-critical); consequential at moderate confidence escalates to ASK.

subject: Interview request about Acme
body: We'd love to do an interview request about Acme for an upcoming podcast. Are you available next week?
notes: Mentions Acme (product) + media keywords -> APPROVE floor; consequential at moderate confidence escalates to ASK.
